task_description:
设计《无畏契约战绩分析》网页主页 PNG 设计图。要求：
1. 标题区：醒目的《无畏契约战绩分析》标题 + Logo 位置
2. 导航栏：玩家信息、战绩统计、英雄分析、排行榜等主菜单
3. 核心区域：
   - 左侧：玩家账户卡片（等级、排位段位、胜率）
   - 中央：最近10场战绩表格（英雄、K/D/A、胜负、时长）
   - 右侧：英雄使用率排行
4. 底部：数据统计面板（总场数、整体胜率、最佳英雄等）
5. 风格：暗黑色系 + 紫/蓝科技感配色，体现竞技游戏特质
6. 分辨率：1920x1080px

生成为 ~/Desktop/valorant_design.png

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# 创建画布 - 1920x1080
width, height = 1920, 1080
img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color='#0a0e27')  # 暗黑底色
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# 定义颜色体系
color_bg_dark = '#0a0e27'  # 背景深色
color_bg_light = '#1a1f3a'  # 浅暗色
color_accent_purple = '#9d4edd'  # 紫色
color_accent_blue = '#5a7aff'  # 蓝色
color_accent_cyan = '#00d9ff'  # 青色
color_text_white = '#ffffff'  # 白色
color_text_gray = '#b0b8cc'  # 灰色
color_win = '#4ade80'  # 胜利绿
color_lose = '#ef4444'  # 失败红

# ===== 1. 标题区域 =====
header_height = 100
draw.rectangle([(0, 0), (width, header_height)], fill=color_bg_light)
# 绘制渐变效果（通过线条模拟）
for i in range(header_height):
    alpha_val = int(255 * (1 - i / header_height / 2))
    draw.line([(0, i), (width, i)], fill=color_accent_purple)

# Logo 位置标记（简化：用圆形代表）
draw.ellipse([(30, 20), (80, 70)], outline=color_accent_cyan, width=3)
draw.text((95, 35), "VALORANT", fill=color_accent_cyan)

# 标题
title_text = "无畏契约 战绩分析"
draw.text((450, 30), title_text, fill=color_text_white)

# ===== 2. 导航栏 =====
nav_y = header_height + 10
navbar_items = ["玩家信息", "战绩统计", "英雄分析", "排行榜", "设置"]
nav_x_start = 150
for i, item in enumerate(navbar_items):
    x_pos = nav_x_start + i * 280
    draw.text((x_pos, nav_y), item, fill=color_accent_blue)

# ===== 3. 核心布局分割线 =====
core_y = nav_y + 50

# 3.1 左侧玩家卡片（宽度约320px）
left_x, left_y = 20, core_y
left_width, left_height = 300, 400

# 玩家卡片背景
draw.rectangle(
    [(left_x, left_y), (left_x + left_width, left_y + left_height)],
    fill=color_bg_light,
    outline=color_accent_purple,
    width=2
)

# 玩家卡片内容
card_text_x = left_x + 20
card_text_y = left_y + 20
draw.text((card_text_x, card_text_y), "玩家账户", fill=color_accent_cyan)
draw.text((card_text_x, card_text_y + 50), "ID: ProPlayer#CN", fill=color_text_white)
draw.text((card_text_x, card_text_y + 90), "等级: 35", fill=color_text_gray)
draw.text((card_text_x, card_text_y + 130), "排位段位: 铂金2", fill=color_accent_blue)
draw.text((card_text_x, card_text_y + 170), "整体胜率: 52.3%", fill=color_text_gray)
draw.text((card_text_x, card_text_y + 210), "总场数: 285", fill=color_text_gray)
draw.text((card_text_x, card_text_y + 250), "主要角色: 刺客", fill=color_accent_blue)

# 3.2 中央战绩表格（宽度约1250px）
middle_x = left_x + left_width + 30
middle_width = 1250
middle_height = 400

# 表格背景
draw.rectangle(
    [(middle_x, left_y), (middle_x + middle_width, left_y + middle_height)],
    fill=color_bg_light,
    outline=color_accent_blue,
    width=2
)

# 表格标题
table_title_y = left_y + 15
draw.text((middle_x + 20, table_title_y), "最近10场战绩", fill=color_accent_cyan)

# 表格列头
header_y = table_title_y + 40
col_x_positions = [middle_x + 30, middle_x + 200, middle_x + 400, middle_x + 600, middle_x + 800, middle_x + 1000]
col_headers = ["英雄", "K/D/A", "胜负", "得分", "用时", "日期"]
for i, header in enumerate(col_headers):
    draw.text((col_x_positions[i], header_y), header, fill=color_accent_blue)

# 表格行数据
row_y = header_y + 40
row_height = 35
hero_data = [
    ("刺客", "12/3/8", "胜", "2850", "32:15", "今天"),
    ("信使", "8/4/15", "胜", "2150", "28:42", "昨天"),
    ("刺客", "15/5/6", "胜", "3100", "35:20", "3天前"),
    ("魂火", "5/8/12", "负", "1850", "26:30", "3天前"),
    ("浮浪", "10/6/9", "胜", "2450", "31:05", "4天前"),
    ("刺客", "13/4/7", "胜", "2900", "33:10", "4天前"),
    ("信使", "9/5/14", "胜", "2300", "29:15", "5天前"),
    ("绝望", "6/9/10", "负", "1950", "27:45", "5天前"),
]

for idx, (hero, kda, result, score, duration, date) in enumerate(hero_data):
    row_color = color_text_white
    draw.text((col_x_positions[0], row_y + idx * row_height), hero, fill=row_color)
    draw.text((col_x_positions[1], row_y + idx * row_height), kda, fill=color_accent_purple)
    result_color = color_win if result == "胜" else color_lose
    draw.text((col_x_positions[2], row_y + idx * row_height), result, fill=result_color)
    draw.text((col_x_positions[3], row_y + idx * row_height), score, fill=color_text_gray)
    draw.text((col_x_positions[4], row_y + idx * row_height), duration, fill=color_text_gray)
    draw.text((col_x_positions[5], row_y + idx * row_height), date, fill=color_text_gray)

# 3.3 右侧英雄使用率排行
right_x = middle_x + middle_width + 20
right_width = 280
right_height = 400

draw.rectangle(
    [(right_x, left_y), (right_x + right_width, left_y + right_height)],
    fill=color_bg_light,
    outline=color_accent_purple,
    width=2
)

draw.text((right_x + 15, left_y + 15), "英雄使用率", fill=color_accent_cyan)

# 英雄排行数据
hero_rank_y = left_y + 60
hero_ranks = [
    ("刺客", "35%"),
    ("信使", "25%"),
    ("浮浪", "15%"),
    ("魂火", "12%"),
    ("绝望", "8%"),
    ("空灵", "5%"),
]

for idx, (hero_name, rate) in enumerate(hero_ranks):
    y = hero_rank_y + idx * 50
    draw.text((right_x + 15, y), f"{idx+1}. {hero_name}", fill=color_text_white)
    # 绘制进度条
    bar_width = int(200 * float(rate.rstrip('%')) / 100)
    draw.rectangle(
        [(right_x + 15, y + 25), (right_x + 15 + bar_width, y + 30)],
        fill=color_accent_blue
    )
    draw.text((right_x + 220, y + 20), rate, fill=color_accent_cyan)

# ===== 4. 底部数据统计面板 =====
bottom_y = left_y + left_height + 30
bottom_height = 120

draw.rectangle(
    [(20, bottom_y), (width - 20, bottom_y + bottom_height)],
    fill=color_bg_light,
    outline=color_accent_cyan,
    width=2
)

draw.text((40, bottom_y + 15), "数据统计", fill=color_accent_cyan)

# 统计卡片
stats_data = [
    ("总场数", "285"),
    ("整体胜率", "52.3%"),
    ("最佳英雄", "刺客"),
    ("平均K/D", "2.15"),
    ("连胜纪录", "8"),
]

card_width = (width - 80) // len(stats_data)
for idx, (label, value) in enumerate(stats_data):
    card_x = 40 + idx * card_width
    draw.text((card_x, bottom_y + 35), label, fill=color_text_gray)
    draw.text((card_x, bottom_y + 60), value, fill=color_accent_blue)

# ===== 5. 保存图片 =====
output_path = '/Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_design.png'
img.save(output_path)
print(f'✓ 设计图已生成: {output_path}')
print(f'✓ 分辨率: {width}x{height}px')
print(f'✓ 风格: 暗黑 + 紫蓝科技感')
